metadata.description: AI-DLC development harness collection. Brings the AI-Driven Development Lifecycle to popular project management platforms via Claude Code plugins.

plugins.name: linear
plugins.description: AI-DLC development harness for Linear. 6 modular skills, independent review agents (proposal-reviewer + task-reviewer), PostToolUse hooks, structured elaboration via AskUserQuestion, label-stacking proposal state machine, acceptance criteria management, and multi-agent team observability.
